name: SESSION-003
description: The client-side token encryption key must not be recoverable from the same storage as the ciphertext it protects
descriptionHtml: The client-side token encryption key must not be recoverable from the same storage as the ciphertext it protects
statusMessage: SESSION-003 (known issue): the token encryption key is recoverable from the same localStorage as the ciphertext it protects, so the 'encryption' provides no real protection against XSS/malicious-script token theft. See this test's Javadoc. expected [false] but found [true]
statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: SESSION-003 (known issue): the token encryption key is recoverable from the same localStorage as the ciphertext it protects, so the 'encryption' provides no real protection against XSS/malicious-script token theft. See this test's Javadoc. expected [false] but found [true]
